summary: Comprehensive HUMOPS backend testing completed - all 39 pytest tests passed (100%). Covered auth, RBAC (6 roles), need CRUD + priority scoring, volunteer list/leaderboard, resources + shortages, matching engine (suggest/auto-assign/AI explain via Claude Sonnet 4.5), mission lifecycle (trust score +1.5, completed_missions +1), citizen reports with AI NLP extraction, dashboard/analytics/audit log, disaster mode toggle with re-prioritization boost, AI insight & forecast endpoints.

minor.issue: Inner call passes admin user to suggest_matches which has a require_roles-wrapped dependency path, but only works because suggest uses get_current_user. Fine today; document and keep consistent.
Publicly accessible (no auth). Consider restricting to admin role in production.
on_startup uses deprecated FastAPI event handlers; migrate to lifespan context for forward compatibility.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~890 lines; consider splitting into routers (auth, needs, volunteers, resources, matching, missions, citizen, dashboard, ai) for maintainability.
JWT_SECRET in .env is a dev secret - ensure it is rotated in production.
/api/seed/demo is exposed publicly; protect behind admin role or a one-shot script.
compute_priority recomputes wait_hours using created_at parsed via fromisoformat; ensure all stored timestamps are tz-aware ISO strings (they are via iso(now_utc())).
require_roles auto-allows 'admin' even when not listed; documented behaviour but surprising - consider making roles explicit.
auto_assign calls suggest_matches(need_id, user) - relies on non-ASGI internal call; works but bypasses FastAPI dependency validation. OK but note.
Citizen reports endpoint runs AI synchronously before returning - may add 3-5s latency per submission; consider background task.
seed_data_creation: Auto-seeded on backend startup. Created several TEST_ prefixed needs/resources/users during test run - not cleaned up but identifiable by TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints verified working end-to-end: auth + JWT, RBAC with 403 for citizen on admin endpoints, priority scoring in 0-100 range with flood need top-ranked, resource shortages returns >=2 seeded items (blankets + oxygen), matching suggest/auto-assign/explain working, mission completion updates volunteer trust_score and completed_missions, disaster mode toggle boosts relevant categories, Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations returns non-empty strings for ai/insight, ai/forecast, matching/explain, and citizen-report NLP extraction. No regressions.
